title: Acoustic Night
description: Unwind with live acoustic performances from local artists while sipping your favorite brew. Our intimate setting creates the perfect backdrop for a relaxing evening.

title: Latte Art Workshop
description: Learn the art of pouring beautiful latte art from our head barista. All skill levels welcome. Includes all materials and your practice drinks!

title: Golden Hour Specials
description: Enjoy 20% off all specialty drinks and select pastries during our golden hour. The perfect mid-week pick-me-up at a sweet price.

title: Open Mic Night
description: Share your poetry, music, or comedy on our cozy stage. Sign up at the counter. All forms of expression welcome in a supportive, warm environment.

title: Coffee Cupping Experience
description: Explore single-origin coffees from around the world. Learn to taste flavor notes, understand roast profiles, and discover your perfect cup.

title: Book & Brew Club
description: Join fellow book lovers for lively discussions over specialty coffee. This month's selection is announced on our Instagram. Free to join!
